Acme Corp

Staff Platform Architect

Remote (USA)

$210K - $250K/yr

About the role
We are looking for a Staff Platform Architect to lead our infrastructure team.

As the Staff Platform Architect, you will be responsible for designing and implementing the core platform that powers our products.
  • Design and scale distributed systems serving millions of users
  • Lead architecture reviews and drive technical standards across the engineering org
  • Mentor senior engineers and foster a culture of technical excellence
  • Drive technical strategy aligned with business objectives
  • Own the reliability and performance of critical platform services

Requirements
  • 10+ years of software engineering experience
  • Deep expertise in cloud-native architecture (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
  • Experience with Kubernetes, microservices, and event-driven systems
  • Strong communication skills and ability to influence across teams
  • Track record of shipping complex, high-scale systems

Compensation
Base salary: $210,000 - $250,000 annually plus equity and benefits.
